docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-29-2022 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SALMON, DIANE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MORENTI, MARIA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-29-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-29-2022 BY VISITING JUDGE SYLVIA L. HUSING. PLAINTIFF DIANE SALMON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARIA MORENTI IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS MATT DESOTO. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. DEFENDANT MARIA MORENTI INFORMS COURTROOM CLERK REGARDING OF A RESTRAINING ORDER THAT SHE HAS AGAINST THE PLAINTIFF. COURT IN RECESS AT 2:42 PM AND RESUMED AT 3:04 PM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEPUTY SINGH AND DEPUTY TAUSCHER. JUDGE: SYLVIA L. HUSING; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,247.00 FILED BY SALMON, DIANE AS TO DEFENDANT MORENTI, MARIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-29-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00); REMARKS:ATTEMPTS MADE TO NO AVAIL. NO RESPONSE TO NOTICES LEFT AT THE ADDRESS PROVIDED. FILED BY PLAINTIFF SALMON, DIANE AS TO DEFENDANT MORENTI, MARIA
